request.prompt:
Determine whether N.Flying has any publicly announced events after 2026-07-15 (concerts, tours, or fan meetings). Search for this artist only; do not bundle another artist.

Strict evidence rules: accept only an official artist/company source, promoter, venue, ticketing source, or reliable media. Exclude kpopofficial.com and all other event aggregators as evidence. Do not guess. A general tour announcement without a dated stop is not an event. If no qualifying public event is found, return NO_EVENTS_FOUND.

For every event you claim, the artist must match and you must provide the complete exact date or date range, venue, city/country, and a structured web-search citation with URL, title, and cited text that directly supports that same event. Do not claim an event without a citation.

Return only these fields in this order:
VERDICT: EVENTS_FOUND | NO_EVENTS_FOUND
EVENT_COUNT: <n>
EVENTS:
- ARTIST: ...
  DATES: ...
  VENUE: ...
  CITY_COUNTRY: ...
  SOURCE_CLASS: official_artist_company | promoter | venue | ticketing | reliable_media
  CITATION_URL: ...
  CITED_TEXT: ...
REASON: one short factual sentence

content.text: I'll search for N.Flying upcoming events systematically across multiple source types.

content.text:
Based on my thorough research, here is the full assessment. All events found (Seoul fan meeting March 21–22, Taipei fan concert April 11–12, Macau fan concert May 9) are **prior to** the cutoff date of 2026-07-15. The Singapore Theatre at MediaCorp show was November 23, 2025 — also past. Ticketmaster, Live Nation, and Songkick's current calendar all confirm **no upcoming N.Flying events are scheduled** beyond July 15, 2026.

---

**VERDICT:** NO_EVENTS_FOUND

**EVENT_COUNT:** 0

**EVENTS:** *(none)*

**REASON:** All confirmed N.Flying events in 2026 — the Seoul fan meeting (March 21–22), Taipei fan concert (April 11–12), and Macau fan concert (May 9) — occurred before the July 15, 2026 cutoff;

citations.cited_text: We're sorry, but we couldn't find any upcoming concerts for N.Flying.
